mapper.sql: SELECT o.opportunity_id, o.opportunity_no, o.opportunity_name, o.customer_id, o.contact_id, o.lead_id, o.opportunity_source, o.expected_amount, o.expected_date, o.stage_code, o.stage_name, o.win_rate, o.weighted_amount, o.opportunity_status, o.competitor, o.pain_point, o.solution, o.lost_reason, o.lost_remark, o.actual_amount, o.actual_date, o.user_id, o.dept_id, o.next_action, o.next_time, o.stage_enter_time, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark, c.customer_name, ct.name as contact_name, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name FROM mk_opportunity o LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_contact ct ON o.contact_id = ct.contact_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON o.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.select: WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.stage_code = #{stageCode} ORDER BY o.opportunity_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_opportunity (opportunity_no, opportunity_name, customer_id, contact_id, lead_id, opportunity_source, expected_amount, expected_date, stage_code, stage_name, win_rate, weighted_amount, opportunity_status, competitor, pain_point, solution, user_id, dept_id, next_action, next_time, stage_enter_time, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{opportunityNo}, #{opportunityName}, #{customerId}, #{contactId}, #{leadId}, #{opportunitySource}, #{expectedAmount}, #{expectedDate}, #{stageCode}, #{stageName}, #{winRate}, #{weightedAmount}, #{opportunityStatus}, #{competitor}, #{painPoint}, #{solution}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{nextAction}, #{nextTime}, #{stageEnterTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_opportunity SET del_flag = '2' WHERE opportunity_id IN #{opportunityId}
mapper.select: WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.opportunity_status = '0' AND o.stage_enter_time IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), o.stage_enter_time) > ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(s.max_days), 30) FROM mk_opportunity_stage s WHERE s.stage_code = o.stage_code AND s.status = '0' ) ORDER BY o.stage_enter_time ASC
